About logos

1985 NFL Draft

Previous Season Next Season

Super Bowl Champion: Chicago Bears

AP MVP: Marcus Allen

AP Offensive Rookie of the Year: Eddie Brown

AP Defensive Rookie of the Year: Duane Bickett

AP Offensive Player of the Year: Marcus Allen

AP Defensive Player of the Year: Mike Singletary

Passing Leader: Dan Marino, 4137 Yds

Rushing Leader: Marcus Allen, 1759 Yds

Receiving Leader: Steve Largent, 1287 Yds

Become a Stathead & surf this site ad-free.
